{"code":"import sys

sql = """
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stcd) AS total_stations
FROM sl323.st_stbprp_b
"""

result = query(sql)
print(f"测站总数: {result[0]['total_stations']}")"}

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/git/hermes-agent/skills/water-resources/lib')
from db import query

sql = """
SELECT sttp,
       CASE sttp
         WHEN 'ZZ' THEN '水位站'
         WHEN 'ZQ' THEN '水文站'
         WHEN 'RR' THEN '水库站'
         ELSE sttp
       END AS type_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT stcd) AS cnt
FROM sl323.st_stbprp_b
GROUP BY sttp
ORDER BY cnt DESC
"""

for row in query(sql):
    print(f"  {row['type_name']:<6} ({row['sttp']}): {row['cnt']} 个")"}
